name: Tapioca Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 8-cup (2-liter) glass measuring cup, stir together the milk, tapioca, and sugar. Cover tightly with microwave plastic wrap. Cook at 100% power for 5 minutes in a 650-700 watt microwave. Prick the plastic to release steam.
2. Remove from the microwave and uncover. Stir well and cook, uncovered, for an additional 4 minutes in a 650-700 watt microwave or 6 minutes in a 400-500 watt microwave.
3. Remove from the microwave and stir well. In a medium bowl, beat together the egg whites and vanilla extract. Slowly pour about half of the tapioca mixture into the egg whites, stirring constantly to warm them. Stir the warmed egg white mixture back into the tapioca. Cook, uncovered, for 1 minute in a 650-700 watt microwave or 1.5 minutes in a 400-500 watt microwave.
4. Remove from the microwave and stir well. Cover the surface with a piece of microwave plastic wrap to prevent a skin from forming. Serve warm or chilled.
Serves 4 (3/4 cup servings). Contains 98 calories and less than 1 gram of fat.
